  RESET CONFIGURATION
  -------------------
  Reset Type          : {reset_type}  (Cold / Warm / Global)
  Reset Trigger       : {reset_trigger}  (reboot-cold / solar-cold / reboot-warm / solar-warm / solar-global / platform-AGR / platform-AWR / platform-SWR)
  Post-Setup Script   : {post_setup_script}
  Number of Resets    : {num_resets}
  Reset Sequence      : {reset_sequence}  (e.g., "Cold Boot -> Global Reset -> Cold Reset")

  STAGE PROGRESS — FIRST BOOT
  ----------------------------
  Stage 0 (SPARK Bootstrap)       : {stage0}
  Stage 1 (sle.simics Setup)      : {stage1}
  Stage 2 (VP Platform Setup)     : {stage2}
  Stage 3 (HSLE Core Setup)       : {stage3}
  Stage 4 (CBB Reset Flow)        : {stage4}
  Stage 5 (RTL Reset Phases)      : {stage5}
  Stage 6 (BIOS Boot)             : {stage6}  (PARTIAL if BIOS-initiated reset)
  Stage 7 (OS Boot)               : {stage7}  (NOT REACHED if BIOS-initiated reset)

  STAGE PROGRESS — RESET CYCLE {reset_cycle_num}
  -----------------------------------------------
  Stage 8  (Reset Trigger)        : {stage8}
  Stage 9  (Reset Hardware Entry) : {stage9}
  Stage 10 (Second Boot RTL)      : {stage10}
  Stage 11 (Second BIOS Boot)     : {stage11}
  Stage 12 (Second OS Boot)       : {stage12}
